name: Ping Pong
current_goal: Maintain the single-node intranet speed-test service with browser-scoped Recent Results, fixed homepage Quick 20s and Full 30s modes, proportional startup trimming, Raw CV and Stable CV throughput diagnostics, current-run Raw Data popup/CSV diagnostics, stability-first completion summaries, hotspot data-plan warning, required per-test Wired/Wi-Fi labeling, current connection IP visibility, Web Worker execution, HTML/PNG/Markdown IT diagnostic report export, local-throttled maintenance self-tests, a desktop one-screen dashboard, Admin Console controls, local production health, OctoPulse visibility, and repo-visible reusable documentation.
latest_summary: Changed homepage warnings to a fixed-height carousel with shortened one-line copy and marquee animation only when message text overflows. Desktop/tablet warnings stay 64px tall, mobile warnings stay 72px tall, carousel auto-rotation and hover/focus pause remain active, and the hotspot title remains red.
next_action: Review and commit the fixed-height warning carousel, marquee behavior, auto-rotation, hotspot title color, and desktop metric-card layout fix when ready, then push local commits to origin/main if desired. Separately decide whether the pre-existing .gitignore, AGENTS.md, deleted Ping-Pong project docx, untracked HTML specification, docs/analysis-data-debugging.md, and docs/speed-test-statistics-whitepaper.md changes are intentional.

last_commands: Browser warning carousel QA at 1191x964, 1089x964, 1280x900, 1710x1021, and 390x844
verification.notes: Homepage warning-carousel verification passed. Typecheck, full Vitest suite (87 tests), whitespace diff check, and production build passed. The PORT=8200 npm start service was restarted after the final build and /api/health returned ok. Browser QA confirmed page identity, nonblank content, no framework overlay, no console warnings/errors, fixed warning heights at 64px for 1191x964, 1089x964, 1280x900, and 1710x1021, fixed 72px warning height at 390x844, no Download/Jitter or Upload/HTTP Loss overlap, no warning-driven full-page height growth on desktop viewports, mobile vertical scroll remained reachable, hotspot title color computed as rgb(180, 35, 24), auto-rotation moved between 1/2 and 2/2 at about 2-second intervals, focus pause kept the selected warning stable after the next control received focus, and long mobile warning copy used .is-marquee without increasing card height. Browser screenshot capture timed out during evidence collection, so rendered QA evidence was DOM, computed style, console, and interaction state.

attention: Working tree remains dirty beyond .ai/status.json because of the fixed-height warning carousel/marquee/layout fix in README.md, src/client/App.tsx, and src/client/styles.css, plus pre-existing .gitignore and AGENTS.md edits, a deleted Ping-Pong project docx, untracked Ping-Pong-Project-Specification.html, docs/analysis-data-debugging.md, and docs/speed-test-statistics-whitepaper.md.
.ai/status.json was refreshed after the UI verification and is intentionally uncommitted as the current delivery-state snapshot.
The branch is ahead of origin/main by 4 commits and has not been pushed.
The running service uses .env PORT=8200, not the README default 8080.
Local throttled runs are maintenance checks only; a non-local intranet device test is still required to evaluate real network performance.
